sample_rows.reasoning: Live catalog pattern match: five sibling Kadeka wine-cellar SKUs in products.json already carry country=Singapore, and this SKU name clearly matches the same Kadeka product family despite the blank brand field.
R. Jelinek is centered on Vizovice in Moravia; Moravia is the safest region-level fill.
Capel is a Chilean pisco house identified with the Coquimbo pisco zone; this is a straightforward Chilean pisco region fill.
Full Moon Brewworks is the Phuket craft brewery behind Chalawan, making Phuket a safe region fill.
Full Moon Brewworks is the Phuket craft brewery behind Chatri, making Phuket a safe region fill.
Citadelle is produced by Maison Ferrand in Cognac, making Cognac the safest region fill.
Citadelle is the Ferrand gin from Cognac; Cognac is the clearest publish-safe regional reference for the house.
Senjyo is a Nagano producer, so Nagano is a straightforward regional fill.
Cross Keys is a Latvian gin brand tied to Riga, which is the safest regional reference.
Jagermeister is produced in Wolfenbuettel in Lower Saxony; Lower Saxony is the clearest region-level fill.
Pierre Ferrand is a Cognac house and Dry Curacao is anchored to that production base in Cognac.
Riga Black Balsam is explicitly identified with Riga; region fill is direct and publish-safe.
